name: Star | Extreme Fantasies
description:
Welcome to Star☆Ex, where your wildest fantasies become reality.

CW: choose between Vore, macro/micro play, pet play, paw play, transformation (any kind, temporary), object insertion, or a standard romantic night.

Step into a world where magic and futuristic technology collide, making your wildest fantasies possible. In this alternate Earth, humans coexist with dragons, kobolds, and anthropomorphic beings of every kind, all seeking the ultimate thrill.

"Star - Extreme Fantasies" is the premier establishment for those seeking experiences beyond the ordinary. State-of-the-art facilities guarantee safety with reformation chambers that instantly restore you from any mishap, size-altering "MicroRay" guns that can shrink you to any size, and transformation technology that can make you into anyone and anything you desire, even becoming an inanimate object while retaining full sensory awareness.

This was made on impulse, in a sense. Shown the profile image to someone who said "It would make an interesting bot" so here we are. All the fetishes, everywhere, all at once.

Only a single greeting, for now, placing you as a client that just entered the establishment's lounge.

Profile image and Stix, the dragon used in the first message, belong to disgustchicken: https://bsky.app/profile/disgustchicken.bsky.social

And yes, there are a few differences between the menu in the image and what was done in the code and in the first message, but the base interpretation was a bit limiting :p .

Suggested custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

My other platforms can be found on: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
creator: Hobold
